title: Archive Entry
description: One captured unit of experience. A stable coordinate in the personal archive: reachable, queryable, and linked back to its original context.

id.description: Stable identifier. Prefer the source shortcode so re-capture is idempotent (deduplicated).

source.description: Where this entry originated. Free-form but conventionally 'instagram'.

permalink.description: Link back to the original context. Addressability: every entry must be reachable at its origin.

author.description: Handle of the account that posted the content.

captured_at.description: When this entry entered your archive (ingestion time).

posted_at.description: When the content was originally posted, if recoverable from the DOM.

media.description: One or more media units. A carousel post yields several.

src.description: Media URL as seen at capture time. May expire; see 'local' for a durable copy.

local.description: Optional path to a downloaded, non-volatile copy under the archive.

alt.description: Alt text as exposed by the platform. Often a machine caption — useful signal for search.

hashtags.description: Hashtags extracted from the caption (without the leading #).

notes.description: Your own annotation. The archivist's marginalia.
